_comment: Grade/assessment SCALE registry — so the ecosystem can TRANSLATE 'what an A means' across contexts (e.g., a 10-point letter scale vs a 7-point scale vs IB 1-7 vs AP 1-5 vs standards-based 1-4 vs GPA). Each scale is its own JSON in a normalized shape; cross-mappings live in ../crosswalks/grade-scales.json. CRITICAL: most cross-scale conversions are INSTITUTION-DEPENDENT and are NOT universal 1:1 equivalences — entries carry confidence + institution_dependent flags. Offline; kept current via standards-updater. Prose: ../grade-scales.md.
